mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, primary_uid, ds_id, path, type, context
mapper.insert: insert into dm_ds_meta_data(primary_uid,ds_id,path,type,context) values(#{puid},#{dsId},#{path},#{type},#{context}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE context = #{context}, gmt_modified = now()
mapper.delete: delete from dm_ds_meta_data where ds_id = #{dsId} and path = #{path} and type = #{type} and #{time} > gmt_modified
delete from dm_ds_meta_data where ds_id = #{dsId} and path like concat(#{path},'%') and #{time} > gmt_modified
delete from dm_ds_meta_data where #{date} > gmt_modified limit 200
